headline: Emerging Markets Surge 2% as Oil Falls 3%

article.title: Iran Deal Hopes Boost Emerging Market Assets as Oil Slides
article.summary: Emerging-market stocks and currencies rose Monday as signs that the US and Iran are nearing a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz pushed oil prices lower and boosted risk appetite.

headline: Crude Falls 3% on Hormuz Deal Progress

article.title: Oil Slides as US Touts Progress on Deal Toward Reopening Hormuz
article.summary: West Texas Intermediate crude briefly fell below $90 a barrel for the first time in almost three weeks amid signs the US and Iran were progressing toward an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
